name: Upload Rapport Journalier HR BMW U11

parameters.formTitle: Upload Rapport Journalier HR BMW U11
parameters.formDescription: Uploadez le rapport journalier BMW U11 (HTML, Excel ou CSV)

parameters.responseBody: ❌ Format de fichier non supporté. Utilisez HTML, Excel (.xlsx/.xls) ou CSV.

parameters.query: SELECT 1 AS skipped -- upsert remplace le DELETE

INSERT INTO daily_hr_report (
  report_date, plant, perimeter, process, circuit, group_name,
  actif, present, nb_abs, p, np, sq, ac, rv, ml, md,
  maladie, mise_en_demeure, abs_p_rate, abs_np_rate, total_abs,
  taux_presence, heures_presence, retard, heures_sup,
  soll, ist, delta, raw_json, source_file, uploaded_by
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.report_date }}'::date,
  '{{ ($json.plant||'BMW U11').replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.perimeter||$json.plant||'BMW U11').replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.process||'').replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.circuit||'').replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.group_name||'').replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  {{ $json.actif||0 }}, {{ $json.present||0 }}, {{ $json.nb_abs||0 }},
  {{ $json.p||0 }}, {{ $json.np||0 }}, {{ $json.sq||0 }},
  {{ $json.ac||0 }}, {{ $json.rv||0 }}, {{ $json.ml||0 }}, {{ $json.md||0 }},
  {{ $json.maladie||0 }}, {{ $json.mise_en_demeure||0 }},
  {{ $json.abs_p_rate||0 }}, {{ $json.abs_np_rate||0 }}, {{ $json.total_abs||0 }},
  {{ $json.taux_presence||0 }}, {{ $json.heures_presence||0 }},
  {{ $json.retard||0 }}, {{ $json.heures_sup||0 }},
  {{ $json.soll||0 }}, {{ $json.ist||0 }}, {{ $json.delta||0 }},
  '{{ ($json.raw_json||'{}').replace(/'/g,"''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ ($json.source_file||'').replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.uploaded_by||'').replace(/'/g,"''") }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (report_date, plant, group_name) DO UPDATE SET
  actif=EXCLUDED.actif, present=EXCLUDED.present, nb_abs=EXCLUDED.nb_abs,
  p=EXCLUDED.p, np=EXCLUDED.np, sq=EXCLUDED.sq, ac=EXCLUDED.ac, rv=EXCLUDED.rv,
  ml=EXCLUDED.ml, md=EXCLUDED.md,
  maladie=EXCLUDED.maladie, mise_en_demeure=EXCLUDED.mise_en_demeure,
  abs_p_rate=EXCLUDED.abs_p_rate, abs_np_rate=EXCLUDED.abs_np_rate,
  total_abs=EXCLUDED.total_abs, taux_presence=EXCLUDED.taux_presence,
  heures_presence=EXCLUDED.heures_presence, retard=EXCLUDED.retard,
  heures_sup=EXCLUDED.heures_sup, soll=EXCLUDED.soll, ist=EXCLUDED.ist,
  delta=EXCLUDED.delta, raw_json=EXCLUDED.raw_json,
  source_file=EXCLUDED.source_file, uploaded_by=EXCLUDED.uploaded_by

INSERT INTO import_history (report_date, plant, source_file, uploaded_by, rows_imported, status, parse_source) VALUES (CURRENT_DATE, 'BMW U11', 'html_upload', '', 0, 'success', 'html_initialRecords') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

parameters.responseBody:
✅ Rapport journalier BMW U11 importé avec succès !

📊 Les données sont maintenant disponibles dans Neon PostgreSQL.
